title: Business Analyst(Non Tech) - till end of 2026 - SGD9k
description:
Morgan McKinley is hiring for a Business Analyst for a 12-month contract assignment with a possibility to extend or to go perm!

Responsibilities: 

  • Facilitate workshops and working group discussions with teams across regions, as well as internal and external stakeholders.
  • Analyze business and system requirements, identify gaps, and propose solutions aligned with organizational objectives.
  • Develop and maintain Business Requirement Documents (BRDs), functional specifications, and process workflows.
  • Support project managers in managing workstreams, ensuring adherence to enterprise standards and governance frameworks; collaborate with technology teams to validate requirements and ensure successful implementation.
  • Assist in preparing project dashboards, reports, and documentation for governance routines; identify opportunities for process improvement and contribute to operational excellence initiatives.
  • Ensure compliance with regulatory, risk, and control requirements throughout the project lifecycle; promote innovation by introducing new ideas, tools, and methodologies to enhance business analysis practices.

Requirements:

  • University degree or equivalent in Business, Finance, Technology, or related discipline
  • At least 2 years of experience as a Business Analyst or in a similar role within Financial Services or Operations.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to detail; excellent command of written and spoken English, capable of clear communication across all organizational levels.
  • Proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Visio) and familiarity with business analysis tools such as JIRA and Confluence.
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced, virtual environment; strong organizational skills to manage multiple priorities under pressure.
  • Knowledge of AI concepts and experience using AI-powered tools (e.g., Copilot) for reporting or automation.
  • Knowledge of structured business analysis methodologies (e.g., Six Sigma, Lean), familiarity with Agile frameworks, and exposure to AI-driven process automation tools.

Interested candidates may apply through the application system or send it to sg-rscontracting@morganmckinley.com. Shortlisted candidates will be notified.

By sending us your personal data and curriculum vitae (CV), you are deemed to consent to Morgan Mckinley Pte Ltd and its affiliates to collect, use and disclose your personal data for the purposes set out in the Privacy Policy available at https://www.morganmckinley.com/sg/privacy-policy. You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree with the Privacy Policy.

Morgan McKinley Pte Ltd
Koh Boon Sien

postedCompany.description:
As a global professional services recruitment consultancy, Morgan McKinley connects specialist talent with leading employers across multiple industries and disciplines.


Our promise to you

You can get the best advice for your career at Morgan McKinley. Our team of consultants have either have an educational background in their sector or have industry experience. We take the time to listen to your long term goals and provide you with honest feedback to help you realise them.

Over the years many people have progressed their careers with us both here in Singapore and internationally and our global presence gives us insight into the domestic and international  markets. In Singapore we specialise in Banking & Financial Services, Legal, Compliance & Audit, Finance & Accounting, IT, Project Management, Sales & Marketing, HR and Supply Chain & Procurement.
